headline: BMO Capital Raises its Price Target on Welltower (WELL) to $245 from $240
summary: Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) is one of the 10 Strong Buy S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On May 4, 2026, BMO Capital raised its price target on Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) to $245 from $240 and maintained an Outperform rating as part of a broader real estate update following Q1 results, interest rate changes, and management […]
